subcodes.first_line: O handmaid who hast borne every tribulation in the path of God! The special favours and unique bounties of His Divine Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه احتملت کل بلیه فی سبیل الله الطاف خاصه و موهبت مختصه حضرت احدیت را در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the power of words; of speech, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
